summary.blocking_reason: Market-data redistribution rights and SCA sign-off are not complete.
summary.next_decision: Licensed feed/vendor vs approved delayed-source launch posture.

checks.label: Demo/live data labelling
checks.evidence: Current provider=live; quote rows carry provenance and data_quality badges. Counts are generated by the Python brain.
checks.next: Keep the visible banner and per-row data-quality badges on every public build.

checks.label: ADX/DFM live refresh gate
checks.evidence: UAE_ALLOW_LIVE_EXCHANGE=1; the scraper can run if invoked.
checks.next: Enable only after the data-rights/licensing posture is explicitly approved.

checks.label: Market-data redistribution rights
checks.evidence: ADX/DFM endpoint map exists, but redistribution rights are not confirmed.
checks.next: Choose licensed feed/vendor or get explicit delayed-source terms clearance.

checks.label: SCA recommendation-risk sign-off
checks.evidence: App is framed as research support, but SCA Resolution 10/R.M-2025 needs legal sign-off.
checks.next: Pull final SCA text and approve the exact public wording before real launch.

checks.label: Personal holdings connection
checks.evidence: No personal holdings or portfolio data is connected in this repo.
checks.next: Connect UAE Portfolio Watcher only after explicit approval.

checks.label: Internal scrape scratch files
checks.evidence: tools/build.sh strips live_quotes.json and symbols.json from web/data and dist/data.
checks.next: Keep scraper scratch ignored and out of public bundles.

checks.label: LLM boundary
checks.evidence: Scores, stance and confidence are deterministic; AI provider only narrates.
checks.next: Do not let an LLM produce prices, scores, or recommendations.
